voice_narrator_01f238afbf_1.0_0.mp3: You walk deeper into the forest.

voice_narrator_0f9d1202ed_1.0_0.mp3: The cold water shocks you, but also reveals the path clearly.
voice_narrator_1dd71df8c1_1.0_0.mp3: As you pick it up, you feel a strange energy flowing through you.

voice_narrator_287c089a6a_1.0_0.mp3: You seem to be in the middle of a dense forest.

voice_narrator_31885e6fd5_1.0_0.mp3: His eyes seem to hold ancient wisdom.
voice_narrator_384c444868_1.0_0.mp3: The shadows circle around you, but don't attack.
voice_narrator_471e6fc587_1.0_0.mp3: An old man emerges from behind the trees.

voice_narrator_57cf7c3653_1.0_0.mp3: The amulet helps you navigate the dark paths.
voice_narrator_642f2bd9fa_1.0_0.mp3: With this artifact, you venture further into the forest.

voice_narrator_69f3eb88e9_1.0_0.mp3: You stumble and fall into a hidden stream.

voice_narrator_72779964c0_1.0_0.mp3: your courage impressed the forest spirits.
voice_narrator_76574a131e_1.0_0.mp3: He gestures toward a hidden path.
voice_narrator_7b9bc62491_1.0_0.mp3: With the Amulet's power, you find your way home safely.

voice_narrator_8d920ed9c4_1.0_0.mp3: The amulet seems to have magical properties.

voice_narrator_93f950b0a6_1.0_0.mp3: You became one with the forest.
voice_narrator_9478d8888f_1.0_0.mp3: You carefully look around the clearing.
voice_narrator_99b5b6b141_1.0_0.mp3: The shadows part revealing a clear part.
voice_narrator_9ff80f1c2a_1.0_0.mp3: The Hermit's Wisdom guided you safely home.

voice_narrator_a86d99e955_1.0_0.mp3: You escaped with the magical emulate.

voice_narrator_be72212a2b_1.0_0.mp3: You chose to stay and learn from the hermit.
voice_narrator_c7a284d0b9_1.0_0.mp3: You carry his teachings with you.
